overall it's a margin of a minute and 12 on Enric Mass and over Primos roglitch a minute and 53 everyone else two minutes and 33 in arrears or more time trial day then 31.1 kilometers destination Alicante got some nervous times to those who wanted to enhance their positions overall and a pan-flat course with even weather conditions throughout making this really a pure test the race of tooth against the clock two intermediate time checks along the way Remy cavania was that said our Benchmark time he was to be in the hot seat for much of the day Simon Yates hoping to rekindle his great time trialing days such as the Giro was going strongly likewise ayuzo from UAE team Emirates Carlos Rodriguez is a young man but he was sporting the white jersey on behalf of evaner Paul who was to start last of course chasing down roglitch and naturally Henrik Mass the nearest men to him overall mass is not a natural time trialist this is not a discipline he enjoys it is however something that Remco evinopol is extraordinarily good at determined he set off from the ramp last of course nearly bumping into the lane markers such was his desire to start driving into the gaps that lay ahead of him and extend his lead overall Primus roglitch was in a real battle with those around him on the timing sheets cavania was looking and wondering and whenever Nepal at the first intermediate bettered his time which had stood all day by 21 seconds it was thumbs up from his teammate sivikov came home very respectively India still have cards to play in the mountains but look what evanapol was doing to the field 36 seconds quicker than any other Rider out there Evan Nepal in charge as he has been for much of the day on the charge Almeida unfortunately charging down the evacuation Lane for the team cars back UK on course but must have lost 20 seconds out there Simon Yates another great strong performance on a time traveling back for him bodes very well the deeper we get into this race still very much in the game ayuzo a minute and 17 he's seeded out there described himself as upset with that result roglitch must have been happy especially when he saw the clock was Green hit the line cavania's time wants to be beaten 12 seconds was the trim 54.4 kilometers per hour the average pace cavania finally relieved of his hot seat mats came in but it was to be a minute down and more and that on roglitch's time what could ever know Paul do even more 55.7 kilometers an hour for the Run trimming the field by 48 seconds but most notably that gap on Primus rugrage Eva Nepal Supreme taking the stage win in this race that has eluded the leader an affirmation of his greatness we know he can climb we know he can time trial and I think we know that he is the man to beat the stage win seeing Eva Nepal finishing 48 seconds in front of roglitch has just enhanced his position overall exponentially the margin now is 2 minutes and 41. over his nearest rival three minutes and three on mats 355 on Rodriguez in four minutes and 50 on Simon Yates in fifth so what's to come stage 11 will be Cabo de Gata it is one for the sprinters us Patterson must be wondering why he wasn't told that Sam Bennett was not going to contest the time trial he could have preserved himself for a day where the points will possibly mean green jersey prizes we can't wait let the battle rage on
